summary: CLT Synapse ERP Historical Import Two-Step Flow Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/preview validates rows, returns preview_id and row-by-row status, (2) Preview correctly identifies missing fields, unknown agents/teams, duplicate phones, (3) Phone numbers cleaned (no .0 suffix), (4) Duplicate phones within file detected, (5) POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/confirm/{preview_id} imports only valid rows, (6) Confirm with invalid/expired preview returns 404, (7) Confirm with already-confirmed preview returns 400, (8) Frontend shows complete two-step flow with preview table and action buttons.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/preview returns preview_id and row-by-row status
Backend: Preview catches missing required fields (Full Name, Phone, Course, Agent, Team)
Backend: Preview catches unknown agent with error message 'Agent not found in system'
Backend: Preview catches unknown team with error message 'Team not found in system'
Backend: Preview detects duplicate phones within the same uploaded file
Backend: Phone numbers stored as floats (e.g., 971500000001.0) are cleaned to string without .0 suffix
Backend: Preview handles partial data (some fields empty) without crashing
Backend: Preview response has correct structure for frontend display (preview_id, total_rows, valid, errors, duplicates, rows[])
Backend: POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/confirm/{preview_id} imports valid rows only
Backend: Confirm returns 404 for invalid/expired preview_id with message 'Preview not found or expired'
Backend: Confirm returns 400 for already-confirmed preview with message 'already been confirmed'
Backend: Confirm response includes success count, students_created, cs_assignments, mentor_assignments
Frontend: Historical Import page loads at /sales/historical-import
Frontend: Page title 'Import Historical Sales Data' displayed
Frontend: Subtitle mentions 'preview before pushing to database'
Frontend: Step 1 'Download Template' visible with download button
Frontend: Step 2 'Upload & Preview' visible with file upload area
Frontend: 'Upload & Preview' button (not direct import) displayed
Frontend: After preview - Step 3 'Review Data' section appears
Frontend: Summary stats show Total Rows, Ready to Import, Errors, Duplicates
Frontend: Preview table shows Row, Status, Name, Phone, Course, Add-ons, Agent, Team, Amount, Issues columns
Frontend: Valid rows show green 'Valid' badge
Frontend: Error rows show red 'Error' badge with specific error messages
Frontend: 'Confirm Import (N valid rows)' button shows correct count
Frontend: 'Re-upload File' button visible and works (clears preview, returns to upload step)
Frontend: CS Assignment info displayed (Falja, Della, Karthika, Nasida: 2 each | Angel: 1)
Frontend: Mentor Assignment info displayed (Edwin, Mathson, Ashwin, Nihal, Sriram)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: clean_val function (line 9852-9862) properly handles NaN, None, and float phone numbers
Backend: Preview stores validated rows in import_previews MongoDB collection with 1-hour TTL index
Backend: Duplicate phone detection works both for DB duplicates and within-file duplicates
Backend: Agent/Team resolution uses case-insensitive regex matching
Frontend: HistoricalImportPage.jsx implements clean 3-step flow (Download -> Upload/Preview -> Review/Confirm)
Frontend: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing with 'TEST' prefix for cleanup. Test leads/students with phones starting with 97150 were created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical Import two-step flow (preview -> confirm) fully tested. Key features: (1) POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/preview validates file, stores in import_previews collection with 1-hour TTL, returns preview_id and row-by-row validation status; (2) POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx/confirm/{preview_id} imports only valid rows to leads and students collections; (3) Known valid agent: 'Kiran VR' in team 'TEAM XLNC'; (4) Frontend at /sales/historical-import shows complete flow with preview table, error messages, and action buttons.

error_messages: Phone X already exists in database

error_responses.404: Preview not found or expired. Please re-upload the file.
error_responses.400: This import has already been confirmed.
